title: acalypha ovata
intro: Acalypha ovata, also known as the elephant ear or cat grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Acalypha ovata include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as being used to manage diabetes and hypertension. Acalypha ovata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or powder, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations to treat various health conditions.
